textByHashes.ebb869b1b2bcc65faaf24d0f21402f2c20632d7b: I have much tidying to do, so please be brief.
textByHashes.87a03e540254ffa99fc0030985491beed09064c1: Try the bottom floor, central area.
textByHashes.b362c26e63da03be2a163bff139cac1b87914c6e: Try the middle floor, central area.
textByHashes.62364ada07aa8101cd4b68c68867a488781faf47: Try the top floor, central area.
textByHashes.5ee2744c15782c878676b1f065821765c32ed0b3: Try the bottom floor, north-eastern bay.
textByHashes.38ad0659abbad80ca5b039f034829161381862a8: Try the middle floor, north-eastern bay.
textByHashes.4ccf4f3ce5b6a3383f5433dbb4c10a1ccd3a3e8d: Try the top floor, north-eastern bay.
textByHashes.2d17dd23a8ebdcb099e7a8052e32fbeafcf40987: Try the bottom floor, south-eastern bay.
textByHashes.359d91e84a3c4678618f72a0e666fba61c401802: Try the middle floor, south-eastern bay.
textByHashes.6b1912a215641d51974d088a8fe3618dbc10bdb8: Try the top floor, south-eastern bay.
textByHashes.36091bbe6be4eb2dad799fa6e137348882114dcd: Try the bottom floor, south-western bay.
textByHashes.58df53c38f07123365aecbc283289f16e4978f8c: Try the middle floor, south-western bay.
textByHashes.6506ac40e79048edf4a49812e1404134ac357a94: Try the top floor, south-western bay.
textByHashes.18fb02acde9ce8a8788458590e6ec4831e6d1594: Try the bottom floor, north-western bay.
textByHashes.916f331f5eda5a91143c48f6c4d7fe68e94aded9: Try the middle floor, north-western bay.
textByHashes.f606a466c4704e662dc7b099386ef78db4fcca28: Try the top floor, north-western bay.
textByHashes.8397db03ed2f07c1bffbed087a008750a1bd417c: I assist the Chief Librarian, Logosia, in the running of the Library. There is always much tidying to be done.
textByHashes.d004b3ede69c1f08c4e564e187379109aed26b83: Logosia is a truly great scholar, but her temperament may not be entirely suited to the duties of a librarian.
textByHashes.5630362ff9ee844c5b3e79208bb6579833ed8495: Hey, I have something for you but you don't have any space for it!
